characters.name: Alfred Miles
characters.description: Alfred 'Paper Boi' MilesPortrayed byBrian Tyree HenryAbraham Clinkscales(young)FamilyEarnest 'Earn' Marks(Cousin)OccupationRapperDrug Dealer Alfred 'Paper Boi' Milesis an up-and-coming rapper fromAtlanta, Georgia, the elder cousin ofEarn Marksand the deuteragonist ofAtlanta. Alfred's past is explored in "FUBU". At some point, he attended military school, but later returned to public school. Alfred was a delinquent in his youth, frequently stealing other students belongings and re-selling them for money. As an up-and-coming rapper, Alfred struggles to understand the difference between real life and street life. Despite being famous, he is genuinely bored with his celebrity status and uninterested in his presence on social media. As a consequence, this often makes him a target for thieves and obsessed fans of his work. Alfred was close with his cousin Earn when they were young, offering him helpful advice and protecting him whenever possible. By Robbin' Season, however, their relationship has begun to wane due to Earn's poor choices as a manager. Alfred has been a fan ofDragon Ball Zsince childhood. This is first touched on in "B.A.N.", a.k.a Black American Network, when he jokingly compares Antoine Smalls to a Super Saiyan.

characters.name: Darius Epps
characters.description: DariusPortrayed byLakeith Stanfield DariusisAlfred Miles' right-hand man and roommate and the tritagonist ofAtlanta. DariusisAlfred "Paper Boi" Milesroommate and (presumably) best friend. The most eccentric of the recurring characters, Darius often shares his deeply philosophical and existential views on the world with his company, with minimal regard to their reception of his insights. That said, Darius is also shown to be a character that others can rely on for some level of emotional support, often providing strong advice toEarnestwhen he's faced with a particularly difficult situation.

characters.name: Dave
characters.description: Daveis DJ at a local radio station in Atlanta and an acquittance ofEarn.

characters.name: Earnest Marks
characters.description: Earnest MarksPortrayed byDonald GloverAlkoya Brunson(young)FamilyAlfred 'Paper Boi' Miles(cousin)Lottie (daughter)Mrs. Marks (mother)Mr. Marks (father)Alfred's mother (aunt)Uncle Willy (Alfred's father)OccupationManager Lottie (daughter) Mrs. Marks (mother) Earn is shown to be cynical and highly intelligent yet strikingly foolish. Even though he and Van are off and on, he is shown to be a loving father to their daughter Lottie. From a young age, Earn has always lacked the confidence of his cousin, Alfred. As a consequence, he demonstrates poor management skills over the course of Alfred's career. At times frugal, Earn often feel due to past experiences of being flexed on then he should as well with his money which ends up not succeeding for him even when trying to save (North of the Border). Loyal to his cousin, Earn strives to make Alfred a big success whilst bringing him and Darius up alongside him and over Robbin' Season makes a bigger effort to keep them from failing even at the risk of causing misfortune to others (such as moving his gun at the airport to Clark County's bag to prevent their arrest and missing the European tour)

characters.name: Lottie
characters.description: Lottie MarksPortrayed byMia AtehortuaAgeInfancyFamilyEarnest Marks(father)Vanessa Keifer(mother)LottieisEarnandVan's baby daughter. Lottie is the daughter of Earn & Van. She lives with Vanessa, & goes to her paternal grandparents near constantly. She is beloved by her family, & is part of the drive behind Earn's want to improve his life. She has been considered by her teacher to have high intelligence. Shows in the last episode of season 2, is much older now, probably around 2 or 3

characters.name: Theodore Perkins
characters.description: Theodore PerkinsPortrayed byDonald GloverAgeunknownFamilyBenny Hope(brother)OccupationSinger  Teddy Perkinsis the titular main antagonist of the season 2 episode ofAtlantaof thesame name. He claims that he was the brother of the famous pianistBenny Hopeand became his caretaker due to his photosensitive condition and being wheelchair-bound. He was portrayed by actor and directorDonald Gloverwho also playsEarnest 'Earn' Marks.

characters.name: Vanessa Keifer
characters.description: Vanessa KieferPortrayed byZazie BeetzFamilyEarn (ex-boyfriend)Lotti (daughter)OccupationSchool teacher (formely) Vanessa "Van" Kieferis a former teacher. She is Earn's on-again, off-again girlfriend and the mother of their daughter Lottie. The season finds Van, who lets her on-and-off boyfriend/father of her daughter Earn stay at her apartment half of the time even though they technically somewhat not together. Van is not really seen much throughout the season but it seems that she was trying to get back to dating but that didn't end too well for her, she loses her job as a school teacher for refusing to do a drug test and admitting to smoking marijuana the night before a surprise drug test, and that she deep down still has feelings for Earn as they become closer in the last two episodes of the season. Vanessa is a very blunt and realistic person. She could be described as a feminist (as seen in episodes 1.03 and 1.06).
characters.personality_section: Vanessa is a very blunt and realistic person. She could be described as a feminist (as seen in episodes 1.03 and 1.06).
